request: generate ranking video for audi q5
title: RANKING AUDI Q5 MODELS
close_narration: Which Q5 model suits you best?
order_rationale: Ordered from base model to high-performance variant.

entries.name: Premium
entries.label: BASE MODEL
entries.one_line_fact: The Premium is the entry-level Q5, offering essential luxury features.

entries.name: Premium Plus
entries.label: MID-TIER LUXURY
entries.one_line_fact: Premium Plus adds advanced features like heated front seats and driver seat memory.

entries.name: Prestige
entries.label: TOP-TIER LUXURY
entries.one_line_fact: Prestige offers high-end features including adaptive xenon headlights and navigation.

entries.name: SQ5
entries.label: HIGH-PERFORMANCE
entries.one_line_fact: The SQ5 combines luxury with sportiness, featuring a 349-horsepower engine.
